description: Address code review findings: add GIANT_JUMP physics tests and document the minV2 derivation.
steps: Step 1: Add GIANT_JUMP physics tests in test/physics.test.ts following the GIANT_LOOP test pattern: one test for speed gate rejection (low speed entry), one test for successful traversal with sufficient speed.
Step 2: Add a derivation comment in src/pieces/definitions.ts explaining the GIANT_JUMP minV2=30 value (scaled from JUMP's minV2=18 for a 3-cell span vs 2-cell span).
acceptance_criteria: GIANT_JUMP minV2 has a justification comment in definitions.ts
